_comment: STANDARD Vector MICROSAR FEE V3 layout descriptor. This is the reusable default shipped next to the engine (dist/engines/vector-fee-v3/conf/). Drop a copy next to an NVM dump — or in ./conf, ../conf, or a folder listed in nvmstudio.nvm.layoutRoots — and the plugin names every FEE chunk from Fee_Lcfg.c and splits business data / MAC / padding using NvM_Cfg.c. 'engine' references the installed pack (id 'vector-fee-v3'); to hot-reload while debugging, replace 'engine' with 'engineScript': './vectorFeeV3.engine.js'. Per-project struct decoding is added by extending 'options' with 'structCatalog' + 'structs.fromSources' + 'blockStructs' (see docs/nvm-layout-providers.md §3d).

sources._comment: feeLcfg names the chunks (tag → name → stored length). nvmCfg (NvM_Cfg.c) splits the stored payload into business data (NvMNvBlockLength) + MAC/CRC (NvMacSize) + padding; omit it and the whole stored payload is one region.

palette._comment: kind -> any CSS color. Style lives here, not in code. A kind with no entry (and no per-field 'color') gets a deterministic auto color.

options._comment: alignment / numberOfSectors / sectorSize are container geometry; tune per project. sectorSize 196608 = 0x30000.

structure._comment: Field layout of each region the parser locates (offsets/lengths RELATIVE to the region start). Omit any part to use the built-in default. With nvmCfg declared, 'payload' = NvM data, 'payloadExtra' = MAC/CRC, 'payloadPadding' = trailing padding.
